_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to monitor system operations and react to events in response to triggers and/or observation of trends or unusual activity.
reference_document_element_description: Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost, and security events, with defined escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.536), AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.533).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.603). Shared vocabulary: [events]. DCWF-only terms [ability, activity, monitor, observation, operations, react] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, availability, cost, defined, escalation, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.870, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to monitor system operations and react to events in response to triggers" and "Implement platform monitoring and alerting for availability, performance, cost," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.557 ≈ STS 0.603 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [events] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.7%. Shared tokens: [events]. DCWF-only: [ability, activity, monitor, observation, operations, react]. WIDAI-only: [alerting, availability, cost, defined, escalation, implement].
